query:
SELECT bi.id, bi.externalId, bi.invoiceDate, bi.invoiceNumber, bi.contactName, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.matchStatus,
  s.externalId AS svc_id, s.supplierName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.externalId = bi.serviceExternalId
WHERE bi.invoiceNumber = 'ST7906'
LIMIT 5;

SELECT bi.id, bi.externalId, bi.invoiceDate, bi.invoiceNumber, bi.contactName, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.matchStatus,
  s.externalId AS svc_id, s.supplierName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.externalId = bi.serviceExternalId
WHERE bi.invoiceNumber = 'ST7906'
